# Release Notes Template

Use this template for every release entry in Version History.

## Release Metadata

- Version: `vX.Y[.Z]`
- Release Date: `YYYY-MM-DD`
- Branch/Tag: `vX.Y-dev` -> `main`
- Status: `draft | released`

## Summary

One paragraph describing the release objective and who benefits most.

## Highlights

- High-impact item 1
- High-impact item 2
- High-impact item 3

## Added

- New feature or capability
- New feature or capability

## Improved

- Performance, UX, reliability, or DX improvement
- Improvement

## Fixed

- Bug fix and user-facing behavior correction
- Bug fix

## Security

- Security hardening or dependency update
- Security note

## Breaking Changes

- Any incompatible change
- Required migration step for each change

## Deprecations

- Deprecated API or behavior
- Planned removal version

## Upgrade Notes

- Link to dedicated upgrade guide, if available.
- Mandatory pre-upgrade checks.

## References

- Technical deep-dive: `../1.2-new-features.md` (or equivalent)
- Related PRs / Issues
- Migration scripts / commands
